title: The End of RoE 222
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] The End of RoE 2.22 Post by Delular » Tue Jun 01, 2010 10:20 am Sorry, deleted my last post cos I'm, well, retarded to say the least. 1. May I ask where one obtains the Eva 2.02 script? 2. So if he is retrieving the core of Unit 0 then is unit 0 an angel as, if Unit 1 is still Lilith, this would explain the initiation of 3I. 3. Unit 6 is a poser, nothing else XD I would believe that the key to Nebuchazzar would be Adam just like in the show, though i have no evidence to sort this claim. Ta people for the replies all the same.

[]: Post by skikes » Tue Jun 01, 2010 10:23 am Must.... resist urge........... to flame! Gahhhhhhh

[]: Post by Eva 04 » Tue Jun 01, 2010 4:49 pm Wow. I have nothing to say to this.

[]: Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 01, 2010 5:13 pm Eva 04 wrote: Wow. I have nothing to say to this.

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Jun 01, 2010 5:21 pm I don't think the 2.22 release came with a script. It does have Japanese subtitles, that may be the closest thing we have.

[]: Post by Wissenschaft » Tue Jun 01, 2010 5:48 pm Besides the script, is there a question in this post? I'm not sure what I'm suppose to say or think about.....

[]: Post by NAveryW » Tue Jun 01, 2010 6:11 pm Ornette wrote: I don't think the 2.22 release came with a script.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jun 01, 2010 6:42 pm Wissenschaft wrote: is there a question in this post?

[]: Re: [Spoilers] The End of RoE 2.22 Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 01, 2010 6:45 pm Delular wrote: Sorry, deleted my last post cos I'm, well, retarded to say the least. (...) 2. So if he is retrieving the core of Unit 0 then is unit 0 an angel as, if Unit 1 is still Lilith, this would explain the initiation of 3I. (...)

[]: Post by JoeD80 » Tue Jun 01, 2010 7:02 pm I think in the movie Ritsuko just meant 3rd impact as in "really large explosion caused by an Angel somehow." IIRC, the line was "second impact continues...third impact begins." The preview of the next movie has the captions "Tokyo-III Near Third Impact Ground Zero" and "Near Third Impact Eyewitness Debriefing in Progress"; I'm pretty sure these mentions of third impact are all referring to the events at the end of 2.0.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 01, 2010 9:55 pm This thread has too many subjects. Please, if you're going to start a thread, give it one concise subject. (And check the thread list -- see navigation bar! -- to make sure the thread you want doesn't already exist.) In this case, we have a thread for discussion of 2.X's finale here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7595 If you feel like your other questions are unresolved, please bring them up in threads about the subjects you want to discuss. Just trying to keep some semblance of order around here. Thanks.
